description: Comprehensive room type definitions across residential, multifamily, and commercial verticals. Each room type carries environmental defaults, audio/video/network/security guidance, and equipment formulas. Environmental defaults are starting points — the agent should confirm or override based on actual site conditions.

residential.label: Residential
residential.description: Single-family homes, estates, custom builds. Typically Control4/Crestron/Savant control, emphasis on aesthetics, WAF (wife acceptance factor), and invisible tech.

res-living.label: Living Room / Great Room
res-living.description: Primary family gathering space. High-quality audio and video, streaming, casual listening. Often open to kitchen/dining.

audio.approach: Architectural ceiling or in-wall speakers for distributed music. Surround system optional around TV area.
audio.subwoofer: 1 minimum for music quality, hide in cabinet or closet

video.approach: Primary display — 65-85" depending on viewing distance. Motorized mount or recessed niche common.

res-living.notes: Open floor plans with kitchen/dining should be treated as one audio zone or separate zones with synced sources.

res-kitchen.label: Kitchen
res-kitchen.description: Cooking and gathering space. Audio for music while cooking. Small display common for recipes/TV.

audio.approach: Ceiling speakers, moisture-aware if near steam/water.

res-kitchen.notes: Often grouped as audio zone with living room in open plans.

res-master-bed.label: Master Bedroom
res-master-bed.description: Private retreat. Audio for sleep sounds/music, display for TV viewing, motorized shading.
res-master-bed.notes: Volume limits at night. Consider separate zone from en-suite bathroom.

res-bedroom.label: Bedroom (Secondary)
res-bedroom.description: Standard bedroom — simpler AV, may be kids room, guest room.

res-master-bath.label: Master Bathroom
res-master-bath.description: Moisture environment. Speakers must be moisture-rated. Mirror TV optional.
res-master-bath.notes: Speakers must be rated for moisture. Keep volume controls accessible.

res-home-theater.label: Home Theater / Media Room
res-home-theater.description: Dedicated entertainment space. Surround sound, projector or large display, acoustic treatment, lighting control.

audio.approach: Dedicated surround system: LCR, surrounds, height channels (Atmos). NOT distributed audio.

speakerRule.notes: 5.1.2 minimum, 7.2.4 for premium. Designed per room geometry, not sqft.

splTarget.notes: Reference level cinema is 85dB with 20dB headroom

displayRule.notes: Projector + screen for >100", 75-85" display for smaller rooms. Screen size based on seating distance.

apRule.notes: Wired devices preferred, streaming box hardwired

res-home-theater.notes: Acoustic treatment critical. Dedicated circuit recommended for AV equipment. Room should be light-controlled.

res-office.label: Home Office
res-office.description: Work from home space. Video conferencing, audio for calls and music, good network.

displayRule.notes: External monitor or TV for video calls

apRule.notes: Hardwired ethernet drop essential, WiFi AP nearby

res-office.notes: Hardwired ethernet is a must. Consider USB-C docking integration.

res-outdoor-patio.label: Outdoor Living / Patio
res-outdoor-patio.description: Covered or uncovered outdoor space. Weather-rated everything.

audio.approach: Outdoor-rated speakers. Landscape speakers for yard, surface-mount for covered patio.

res-outdoor-patio.notes: All speakers, APs, cameras must be outdoor/weather rated. Burial-rated cable for landscape speakers.

res-pool.label: Pool / Pool House
res-pool.description: Water environment. Speakers for poolside, possible pool house with its own system.
res-pool.notes: Pool equipment noise (pump, heater) is 50-65dBA ambient. Speakers must overcome this.

res-garage.label: Garage
res-garage.description: Parking and workshop space. Basic audio, good WiFi, cameras.

res-hallway.label: Hallway / Foyer / Entry
res-hallway.description: Transition space. Light audio, possible entry camera, doorbell, access control.

res-laundry.label: Laundry Room
res-laundry.description: Utility space. Optional speakers, moisture aware.
res-laundry.notes: High ambient noise from washer/dryer. Optional zone.

res-wine-cellar.label: Wine Cellar / Tasting Room
res-wine-cellar.description: Specialty space. Background music, climate monitoring, subtle lighting.

multifamily.label: Multi-Family / MDU
multifamily.description: Apartments, condos, senior living, student housing. Common areas plus in-unit. Riser infrastructure, bulk services, access control throughout.

mf-unit-studio.label: Unit — Studio / 1BR
mf-unit-studio.description: Individual residential unit. Pre-wire for audio, network drops, smart home ready.

apRule.notes: WAP per unit or centralized managed WiFi

mf-unit-studio.notes: Bulk WiFi or per-unit drops depending on property management model.

mf-unit-2br.label: Unit — 2BR+
mf-unit-2br.description: Larger unit. Multiple audio zones possible, 2+ network drops.

mf-lobby.label: Building Lobby / Entrance
mf-lobby.description: First impression space. Background music, directory display, intercom, access control, cameras.

mf-amenity-gym.label: Amenity — Fitness Center
mf-amenity-gym.description: Shared fitness space. High-output audio, displays for cardio, cameras, access control.

mf-amenity-pool.label: Amenity — Pool / Hot Tub
mf-amenity-pool.description: Outdoor or indoor pool area. Weather-rated equipment, safety cameras.
mf-amenity-pool.notes: Required by many insurance carriers. Check local codes for camera placement near pool.

mf-amenity-clubhouse.label: Amenity — Clubhouse / Community Room
mf-amenity-clubhouse.description: Multi-purpose event space. Flexible AV for parties, meetings, movie nights.

control.notes: Simple interface for residents and staff

mf-amenity-cowork.label: Amenity — Co-Working Space
mf-amenity-cowork.description: Shared work area with private phone rooms. Strong WiFi, conferencing, quiet audio.
mf-amenity-cowork.notes: Sound masking between workstations. Phone rooms need acoustic isolation.

mf-corridor.label: Corridor / Hallway
mf-corridor.description: Common hallways. Light speakers, cameras, access control at secure doors.

mf-parking.label: Parking Garage / Surface Lot
mf-parking.description: Vehicle areas. Cameras for coverage, readers at entry/exit, intercom at gates.

cameras.notes: Cover entry/exit lanes, elevator lobbies, stairwells

mf-leasing.label: Leasing Office
mf-leasing.description: Sales/management office. Professional AV, conferencing, digital signage.

mf-mail-package.label: Mail Room / Package Room
mf-mail-package.description: Parcel delivery and pickup. Cameras required, access control.

cameras.notes: Cover all package lockers and entry

mf-riser-idf.label: Telecom Riser / IDF
mf-riser-idf.description: Network distribution closet. Rack, switch, patch panels. Not a living space.

network.notes: Rack, switch, UPS, patch panels. Ventilation/cooling required. 1 per floor or per 50 units.

mf-riser-idf.notes: Dedicated circuit, proper ventilation, minimum 42" deep rack for cable management.

commercial.label: Commercial
commercial.description: Office, retail, hospitality, education, worship, healthcare, restaurant/bar. Widest range of room types.

com-open-office.label: Open Office
com-open-office.description: Cubicle or open-plan workspace. Sound masking, paging, WiFi density.

com-private-office.label: Private Office
com-private-office.description: Individual enclosed office. Speaker for paging/music, possible small display.

com-conference-sm.label: Conference Room — Small (2-6 people)
com-conference-sm.description: Huddle room. Display, camera, ceiling mic, speakers for UC.

com-conference-lg.label: Conference Room — Large (8-20 people)
com-conference-lg.description: Boardroom. Dual displays, ceiling mics, DSP, possible wireless presentation.

com-training.label: Training Room / Classroom
com-training.description: Presentation-focused. Front display/projector, distributed audio, possible divisible.

com-lobby.label: Lobby / Reception
com-lobby.description: First impression. Background music, digital signage, visitor management, cameras.

com-restaurant.label: Restaurant — Dining Area
com-restaurant.description: Dining space. Background to foreground music, possible display for sports/brand.

cameras.notes: Cover cash register, entry, bar area

com-bar.label: Bar / Lounge
com-bar.description: High-energy social space. Dense speakers, multiple displays for sports, good bass.

displayRule.sizeGuide: 55-65" per zone, visible from all seats

com-commercial-kitchen.label: Commercial Kitchen
com-commercial-kitchen.description: BOH food prep. Paging only, waterproof speakers, cameras for health/safety.

com-retail.label: Retail Floor
com-retail.description: Shopping area. Background music, digital signage, security cameras, anti-theft.

com-worship-sanctuary.label: Worship — Sanctuary / Main Hall
com-worship-sanctuary.description: Speech and music reinforcement in large room. Acoustics critical. IMAG video.

audio.approach: Point-source or line array system depending on room size. NOT ceiling speakers in most cases.

speakerRule.notes: Designed per room geometry. Line array for >300 seats, point source for smaller. Under-balcony fills, front fills as needed.

microphone.notes: Wireless handhelds, lavs, choir mics, podium mic

displayRule.notes: IMAG projection or LED wall for >300 seats. Confidence monitors for stage.

com-worship-sanctuary.notes: Acoustic treatment is often the biggest need. Room analysis before system design.

com-worship-multipurpose.label: Worship — Multi-Purpose Room
com-worship-multipurpose.description: Fellowship hall, youth room. Flexible AV for varied uses.

com-education-classroom.label: Education — Classroom
com-education-classroom.description: K-12 or higher ed. Speech reinforcement, presentation display, lecture capture optional.

com-education-lecture.label: Education — Lecture Hall / Auditorium
com-education-lecture.description: Large presentation space. Reinforcement system, projection, recording.

audio.approach: Ceiling distributed for <100 seats, point-source for 100+.

microphone.notes: Podium gooseneck + wireless handheld + wireless lapel

com-healthcare-exam.label: Healthcare — Exam Room
com-healthcare-exam.description: Patient exam room. Display for records/imaging, basic speaker optional.
com-healthcare-exam.notes: HIPAA considerations for display content and network security.

com-healthcare-waiting.label: Healthcare — Waiting Room
com-healthcare-waiting.description: Patient waiting area. Background music, TV, digital signage, good WiFi.

com-fitness.label: Fitness Center / Gym (Commercial)
com-fitness.description: High-energy space requiring full AV coverage with bass reinforcement.

com-ballroom.label: Ballroom / Event Space
com-ballroom.description: Large flexible event space, often divisible. Full AV with partition sensing.

control.notes: Partition sensors for auto zone combining/splitting

com-ballroom.notes: Divisible spaces need independent audio zones that can combine. Partition sensing automates this.

com-hotel-guestroom.label: Hotel — Guest Room
com-hotel-guestroom.description: Individual guest room. Display, network, bedside controls.

apRule.notes: In-room AP or corridor AP coverage

control.notes: Bedside panel for lighting, shading, climate, TV

com-hotel-guestroom.notes: Guest room tech varies enormously by property tier. Budget, midscale, luxury all different.

com-spa.label: Spa / Wellness
com-spa.description: Relaxation space. Very quiet audio, gentle lighting control, card access.
com-spa.notes: Keep it invisible. No visible tech. Volume must be very low and calming.

com-corridor.label: Corridor / Hallway (Commercial)
com-corridor.description: Transition space. Paging, wayfinding, cameras, access points.

com-boh.label: Back-of-House / Service Area
com-boh.description: Staff areas, storage, mechanical. Security cameras, card access, basic network.

com-warehouse.label: Warehouse / Distribution
com-warehouse.description: Large open industrial space. Paging, cameras, WiFi for handhelds/scanners.

audio.approach: Horn speakers for paging in high-noise environments. Not ceiling speakers.

apRule.notes: Industrial-rated APs, antenna aiming for racking aisles

com-parking.label: Parking — Commercial
com-parking.description: Garage or surface lot. Camera coverage, access readers, intercoms.

lpr.notes: License plate recognition at entry/exit for managed parking

com-server-mdf.label: Server Room / MDF
com-server-mdf.description: Main distribution frame. Racks, core switching, UPS, environmental monitoring.

network.notes: Core switch, firewall, patch panels, UPS, PDU. Dedicated cooling. 42U rack minimum.

com-server-mdf.notes: Dedicated HVAC, UPS, generator backup. Access restricted. Environmental sensors for temp/humidity/leak.

com-restroom.label: Restroom (Commercial)
com-restroom.description: Public restroom. Optional background music, moisture-rated.
com-restroom.notes: No cameras in restrooms — ever. Moisture-rated speakers only.

com-custom.label: Custom Room
com-custom.description: User-defined room type. All fields editable. Use as starting point and customize.
com-custom.notes: Fully customizable room type. Set a custom name and adjust all defaults to match the space.

customRoomType.description: Schema for user-created room types. Users can create unlimited custom types that persist in their library.

schema.label: User-provided name
schema.customName: Freeform name (e.g., 'Rooftop Bar', 'Dog Wash Station', 'Recording Studio')
schema.defaults: Copy from closest existing type, then modify

roomTypeCount: 52 room types across 3 verticals + unlimited custom

notes.extensibility: New room types are added by creating a new entry with defaults and rules. No code changes required.
notes.overrides: Environmental defaults are starting points. The agent should confirm critical values (ceiling height, ceiling type, ambient noise) with the designer before applying rules.
notes.formulas: Speaker rules use 'per' (1 per X sqft), 'fixed' (exact count), or 'min' (minimum regardless of sqft). The design-intelligence.json engine applies geometry-based calculations on top of these starting points.
notes.crossReference: Room types reference equipment by type (ceiling-standard, ceiling-high-output, outdoor-rated, etc.) rather than specific SKUs. The user's symbol library maps types to their preferred products.
